name: Explosion
description: a punchy boom for bombs and destructible objects

ai.prompt: A cinematic explosion: a deep punchy sub-heavy blast with a sharp crack, debris scatter and a rumbling tail, powerful and full. High-fidelity recorded foley, close-miked, crisp transient, rich body, natural short tail; single isolated sound; dry with only a subtle natural room; no music, no voice, no melody, no chiptune, no synth beeps, no background noise; broadcast-quality, production-ready.
